title: lyonia ovalifolia var. rubrovenia
intro: Lyonia ovalifolia var. rubrovenia, also known as Red-stemmed Lyonia, is a shrub native to North America, belonging to the family Ericaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits associated with Lyonia ovalifolia var. rubrovenia include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
